Registry / Terms / influence factor

influence factor

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #00375 · 50 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 32 distinct definitions — harmonise.
  3. HIGH 1 diverge (ko).
